overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring an ornate gothic interior with stone arches, stained glass windows, and grand staircases. The character walks along upper balconies, pauses at an overlook, descends to a main hall, and continues exploring the historic building.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper gallery walkway with stone balustrade

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the upper gallery toward the large stained glass window at the end of the hall

entered.detail: tall arched stained glass window with blue and green intricate patterns depicting a face or figure
decorative stone pillar with carved capital supporting the arched ceiling
ornate stone balustrade with spherical finials on posts
vaulted stone ceiling with ribbed arches
large potted palm in decorative planter

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an upper gallery with ornate stone railings on the right. The space features vaulted ceilings, wall sconces, and a large stained glass window visible ahead. Potted plants and decorative columns line the walkway in this empty, warmly lit interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: balcony overlook with bench facing stained glass window below

events.description: character stops at the stone railing to look down at the stained glass window visible on the level below
character turns around and begins walking back toward the grand staircase

agents.ego_description: pausing at the overlook to view the stained glass window from above, then turning and walking back

entered.detail: ornate suspended lantern with glowing light hanging from ceiling
green upholstered bench positioned against the railing

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a curved balcony overlook with a green bench and hanging lanterns. He stops to look down at the large stained glass window visible on the floor below, illuminated from behind. After a moment, he turns and walks back toward the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase descending to main hall

events.description: character begins descending the wide stone staircase toward the main floor

agents.ego_description: walking back along the upper level then descending the grand staircase to the main floor below

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with ornate railings descending to lower level
large multi-light chandelier hanging in the stairwell

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and descends a grand staircase. The space opens up to reveal the main hall below, with chandeliers hanging from the high ceiling. Stone columns and ornate railings frame the descent.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hall with sofas and double-height arches

events.description: character reaches bottom of stairs and enters the spacious main hall with furniture
character turns left to explore the side area of the main hall

agents.ego_description: walking through the main hall, passing upholstered sofas and columns, exploring the ornate interior

entered.detail: cream-colored upholstered sofa with wooden frame
large framed painting on the stone wall
tall arched opening leading to another chamber

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious main hall with polished marble floors, ornate sofas, and large wall paintings. The space features double-height arches and chandeliers. The character turns to explore the left side of the hall, passing wooden chairs and decorative columns.

scene_state.functional_zone: side corridor with arched openings overlooking lower level

agents.ego_description: walking along the side corridor with arched openings overlooking the lower level

entered.detail: series of stone arches creating a corridor with views to lower level
statue visible through the arched opening on the lower level

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a side corridor with arched openings revealing the lower level below. The corridor features stone railings, wall paintings, and potted plants. Through the arches, a distant statue is visible in the chamber below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an ornate gothic interior that transitions from a secluded upper gallery down into a sprawling, opulent main hall. It begins with the character walking along a warmly lit upper gallery lined with stone railings and decorative columns, moving toward a large stained glass window. As the character reaches a curved balcony overlook with hanging lanterns, he pauses to gaze down at the illuminated glass floor below before turning back toward the stairs. The scene then opens up as the camera descends a grand staircase, shifting from the narrow gallery to the vast scale of the main hall with its high ceilings and hanging chandeliers. Finally, the movement flows across polished marble floors and past ornate sofas, eventually turning into a side corridor where arched openings reveal a distant statue in the chamber below.
